entities.description: usb3 1otg is a type of interface used to connect the evaluation board to external devices
emmc is a type of flash memory used for storing the system on the evaluation board
typeco is an organization associated with the bus used in the evaluation board
evaluation board is a hardware platform that connects through the usb3 1otg interface to the emmc flash memory

relations.description: the evaluation board uses the usb3 1otg interface to connect to external devices
the evaluation board can quickly flash the system to the emmc flash memory
typeco is associated with the bus that connects to the usb3 1otg interface
